Exura Vita

Exura Vita
Attributes
NameExura Vita
Formulaexura vita
Mana160
Level Required80
PremiumYes
TypeHealing
Cooldown1s
Group Cooldown1s
VocationDruids, Sorcerers
Soul Points0
Magic Leveln/a
Price25,000 gp

Exura Vita is the most powerful single target healing spell available in Tibia. It is used by Druids and Sorcerers at level 80 or above.
